scene_description:
**Foreground:**  
- **Road surface & markings**: A narrow asphalt road runs centrally, with a solid white edge line on the left (separating the road from a grassy area) and a curved white edge line on the right (where the road meets a hedge). The road surface is smooth and dark gray.  
- **Right foreground**: A dense, well-trimmed green hedge runs parallel to the road. At the base of the hedge, small rectangular signs with animal images (e.g., a cow, deer) are visible. The hedge is bordered by a narrow strip of grass.  
- **Left foreground**: A large area of tall, green grass extends from the road’s edge to the left, with no visible markings or structures.  

**Midground (left of road):**  
- **House**: A single-story building with a beige brick facade and dark gray tiled roof. It has a large window with light-colored curtains on the left, a smaller window, and a chimney. The roofline is gabled.  
- **Barrier**: A white rectangular barrier in front of the house, with red text “SCHERPS” (left side) and black text “015-4310 10” (right side). The barrier is mounted on the ground, next to the house.  
- **Trash bin**: A cylindrical green trash bin with a lid, positioned behind the barrier near the house.  

**Midground (right of road):**  
- **House**: A two-story building with a red brick facade and dark gray tiled roof. It has a gabled roof with a small skylight, three upper-floor windows (one partially covered by a brown panel), and a ground-floor window with multiple panes. An arched doorway is visible.  
- **Garden**: A small garden with dense greenery (tall grasses, red-leafed plants, and leafy foliage). The garden contains the same animal-themed signs as the foreground hedge. A brown wooden gate or fence is near the house, with a narrow path leading toward the building.  

**Background:**  
- **Houses**: Two additional houses. To the left: a single-story beige house with a dark gray roof (partially obscured by the first house). To the right: a two-story house with a dark gray roof and multiple windows, visible beyond the foreground brick house.  
- **Utility pole**: A wooden pole in the center background, with a crossbar holding multiple wires. A single-armed street lamp (cylindrical lamp head) is mounted on the pole.  
- **Trees**: Deciduous trees with green foliage are visible behind the background houses and to the right of the brick house.  

**Text & Signs (all Latin script):**  
- **Barrier (left midground)**: A white rectangular sign with red text “SCHERPS” and black text “015-4310 10” (no back color visible; text is printed directly on the barrier).  
- No road name signs, shop signs, or banners.  

**Infrastructure:**  
- **Utility pole (center background)**: Wood, with a horizontal crossbar holding multiple wires (no transformers or insulators visible). A single-armed street lamp with a cylindrical lamp head is mounted on the pole.  
- **Fences/gates**: A small brown wooden gate/fence near the brick house (right midground).  
- No bollards, barriers, traffic lights, fire hydrants, or guardrails.  

**Vehicles & Plates:**  
- No vehicles or license plates are visible.  

**Buildings & Architecture:**  
- All houses have dark gray tiled roofs (some with gabled styles). The left midground house has a beige brick facade; the right midground house has a red brick facade with an arched doorway. Background houses feature similar roof styles and brick/beige facades.  

**Vegetation & Terrain:**  
- **Grass**: Tall green grass on the left side of the road, and well-maintained hedges/garden plants on the right.  
- **Trees**: Deciduous trees with green foliage in the background.  
- **Terrain**: The ground is flat, with no elevation changes visible.  

**Driving side**: The road has a left-side edge line (separating road from grass), but no vehicles are present to confirm driving direction.

details.name: barrier text
details.reason: The text 'SCHERPS' and the phone number '015-4310 10' are highly specific identifiers.
details.focused_description: The barrier features text: "KOCHLEREN" in red uppercase Latin script, followed by a black telephone icon and the number "015-431919" in black Latin script and numerals.

details.name: animal signs
details.reason: Small signs with animal images are a distinctive local feature.
details.focused_description: A rectangular animal sign with a printed image of a black and white cow. The sign has a light-colored frame showing signs of aging (faded, weathered). The cow in the image has a dark face and a white body with spots. The sign's material appears to be a rigid board or plastic with a printed surface.

details.name: wooden pole
details.reason: The design of the utility pole and lamp head can be a regional indicator.

details.name: white edge line
details.reason: Road markings like edge lines are part of the road infrastructure and can provide regional clues.
